title: Add PostHog Analytics Script to App.DataToolsPro.com
description:
## Context
PostHog is being added as the analytics platform for app.datatoolspro.com to track user events and behavior.

## Implementation
1. Add the PostHog tracking script to the application.
2. Future enhancement: pass userId and teamId to PostHog for user identification.

## Blocker
The initial deployment was blocked because PostHog's script domain was not included in the Content Security Policy (CSP). The CSP `script-src` directive needed to be updated to allow the PostHog script to load.

## Resolution
Updated CSP to include PostHog's domain, and analytics events are now flowing to PostHog.
acceptance_criteria: PostHog script is loaded on all app.datatoolspro.com pages
CSP is updated to allow PostHog script loading
Analytics events are captured and visible in PostHog dashboard
No CSP violation errors in browser console
middleware_changes: PostHog tracking script added to the application template.
implementation_notes: CSP update was required to allow PostHog script loading. The Content-Security-Policy script-src directive was updated to include PostHog's domain alongside existing allowed sources (Salesforce, jQuery, ShareThis, Pendo).
comment_summary: Developer added the script but analytics weren't captured initially due to CSP blocking. Reporter identified the CSP violation. Developer updated CSP on production and confirmed analytics are now flowing.
